## Investment View
ECG scores 54/100 as a mixed_watch setup. The score is driven mainly by the technical breakout picture, with 7 constructive versus 0 adverse stock-specific signals and a market overlay impact of 0 supportive versus 6 adverse effects.

- Thesis: The setup is still mixed and needs cleaner confirmation from price action, stock-specific flow, or a more favorable market overlay before it becomes a stronger breakout candidate.

## What Matters
- Price is holding above the prior 20-day high (135.72), a basic breakout confirmation signal. (high)
- Price is above EMA20, EMA50, EMA200, which keeps the medium-term trend supportive. (medium)

## Risks / Invalidation
- A close back below 135.72 would weaken or invalidate the current breakout picture. (high)
- The name is still only a candidate in the source feed, so the setup is not fully confirmed yet. (medium)
